For leisure & HNW travel

Structured oversight for premium travel programs.

Cinturon360 gives leisure travel advisors and HNW program managers the governance tools to deliver precision, discretion, and accountability — for clients who expect nothing less.

Policy, approvals, and spend visibility for premium and complex leisure travel programs.

Contact Us Join Waitlist

Precision tools for exceptional programs

Complex leisure and HNW travel requires more than booking capability. It requires structured management, clear accountability, and visibility that clients can trust.

✅

Approval workflows for personal travel

Configure approval chains for family, personal, or group travel programs. Define rules by traveller, budget, destination, or itinerary type. Every booking is on record.

📊

Spend visibility across programs

Track travel spend across individuals, families, or programs in real time. Reporting structured for advisor review, family office use, or personal financial management.

🔒

Discretion and data security

Built with enterprise-grade security and hosted in Australia. Client data stays in-region, and access controls ensure only authorised parties see sensitive itinerary and spend data.

📋

Policy for personal programs

Even personal travel programs benefit from rules — preferred suppliers, budget guardrails, approval requirements for high-value bookings. Cinturon360 makes these configurable and enforceable.

🌏

Built for APAC — designed globally

APAC-hosted with multi-currency support and timezone-aware workflows. Designed to serve clients travelling globally from an APAC base of operations.

🤝

Advisor-first tooling

Cinturon360 is a platform for advisors to run exceptional programs, not a tool that displaces them. The platform does the administration — you focus on the client relationship.

Managing a premium travel program?

Speak with the team about how Cinturon360 can bring structured governance and visibility to your leisure or HNW travel advisory practice.

Cinturon360

The modern operating layer for travel management companies and the clients they serve. APAC-first. Globally scalable.
